campaign.campaign_strategy:
Goal: Position Pigeon Air Fryer as the go-to affordable, healthy cooking solution for budget-conscious home cooks in India. | Platforms: ['Instagram', 'YouTube', 'Facebook', 'Twitter'] | Ad Types: ['Carousel Ads showcasing recipes cooked in the air fryer', 'Video Ads highlighting ease of use and affordability', 'Static Ads comparing competitors'] | Targeting: {'demographics': {'age_range': '25-45', 'location': 'India', 'interests': ['cooking', 'healthy eating', 'budget shopping', 'kitchen gadgets']}, 'behavior': ['online shopping', 'price sensitivity', 'value-seeking']}

tweet_ideas: Say goodbye to oily food! The Pigeon Air Fryer helps you cook healthy meals at just ₹3k-₹5k. Affordable, smart, and perfect for Indian kitchens. 🏠🍴
Budget-conscious home cooks, rejoice! The Pigeon Air Fryer is your new kitchen companion. Healthy cooking made affordable. #AirFryerIndia
Why spend hours cooking when you can air-fry your meals in minutes? Get the Pigeon Air Fryer today for just ₹3k-₹5k! #HealthyCooking
Did you know? Air fryers can reduce oil usage by up to 80%! Try the Pigeon Air Fryer for affordable, healthy cooking. #SmartKitchen
Healthy food doesn't have to be expensive. The Pigeon Air Fryer is here to make smart cooking affordable for Indian families. 🥦🍗
Make crispy, tasty meals without breaking the bank! Check out the Pigeon Air Fryer for ₹3k-₹5k. #KitchenGadgets
Cooking just got smarter! The Pigeon Air Fryer is easy to use, affordable, and perfect for budget-conscious cooks. #KitchenTools
Air fryers are trending, but which one is right for you? The Pigeon Air Fryer combines quality and affordability perfectly. 🛒
reel_ideas: Show a quick recipe transformation: raw ingredients to a crispy, healthy meal using the Pigeon Air Fryer.
Compare traditional frying vs air frying with visuals of oil reduction and healthier meals.
Feature a 'Day in the Kitchen' reel with the Pigeon Air Fryer making multiple dishes effortlessly.
Highlight the affordability of the air fryer with a price comparison against competitors.
Create a reel addressing common beginner mistakes when using air fryers and how the Pigeon Air Fryer makes it easier.
